attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"context": null, "model_input": {"text": "CITY GENERAL HOSPITAL
Department of Internal Medicine
123 Healthcare Avenue, New York, NY 10001
Phone: (212) 555-0198 | Fax: (212) 555-0199
MEDICAL PRESCRIPTION
Patient Name: John Michael Doe
Date of Birth: 15/06/1979 | Age: 45 | Sex: Male
Medical Record Number: MRN-2024-78432
Date of Visit: 14/03/2024
Allergies: Penicillin (rash), Sulfa drugs
Diagnosis: Acute bacterial sinusitis (J01.90), Mild hypertension (I10)
Rx:
1. Amoxicillin-Clavulanate (Augmentin) 875mg/125mg
   - Dosage: One tablet twice daily with meals
   - Duration: 10 days
   - Quantity: 20 tablets
   - Refills: 0
2. Ibuprofen 400mg
   - Dosage: One tablet three times daily after meals as needed for pain
   - Duration: 7 days
   - Quantity: 21 tablets
   - Refills: 1
3. Fluticasone Propionate Nasal Spray 50mcg
   - Dosage: Two sprays in each nostril once daily
   - Duration: 30 days
   - Quantity: 1 bottle (120 sprays)
   - Refills: 2
4. Lisinopril 10mg
   - Dosage: One tablet once daily in the morning
   - Duration: 90 days
   - Quantity: 90 tablets
   - Refills: 3
Special Instructions:
- Complete the full course of antibiotics even if symptoms improve
- Avoid alcohol while taking Amoxicillin-Clavulanate
- Monitor blood pressure daily and maintain a log
- Follow up in 2 weeks for blood pressure review
- Return immediately if fever exceeds 102°F or symptoms worsen
Prescribed by: Dr. Sarah Elizabeth Williams, MD, FACP
NPI: 1234567890
DEA: AW1234567
License No: NY-MD-045678
Signature: [Signed Electronically]
Date: 14/03/2024
"}}
